records.name: Appier

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2021 (post-IPO SaaS-mania peak):* stock ¥1,157 (Nov 5) – ¥2,559 (Apr 5) per Nikkei 10-year history; Apr 2021 ¥2,559 was the all-time high in the 5-year window — set just after the March 2021 IPO. **FY12/2021 actual: revenue ¥12,661M; operating loss sustained on growth investment** (pre-turn-to-black year). Sign summary: revenue rose on early-stage SaaS growth; operating losses sustained by self-inflicted strategic investment in AI platform expansion; shares rallied to all-time high ¥2,559 (Apr 5) on post-IPO momentum + SaaS-mania-era hype. 業績 ◎ (revenue) deliberate investment / 株価 ◎◎ (post-IPO peak).

records.name: Appier

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation: *2022 (the turn-to-black year — load-bearing case for the mask fix):* stock ¥695 (May 12) – ¥1,731 (Nov 16); May 2022 trough ¥695 = -73% from the Apr 2021 peak. **FY12/2022 actual: revenue ¥19,427M (+53.4% YoY); operating profit turned to black at full-year level from the prior-period operating loss — first full-year operating profit since IPO** per kabutan + 株探 coverage. The stock recognized the inflection: from May 2022 trough ¥695 to Nov 2022 ¥1,731 = +149% intra-year recovery. Sign summary: revenue rose +53.4% YoY; operating profit turned to black at full-year level from the operating loss prior period; shares rallied off the ¥695 May trough to ¥1,731 Nov 16 high on the turn-to-black announcement; business strong, stock recovering. 業績 ◎◎ (revenue + turn-to-black) / 株価 ◎ (recovery).

records.rawExplanation: *2023 (continued growth — multi-year compounder confirmed):* stock ¥1,157 (Oct 31) – ¥2,175 (Feb 14); Feb 2023 ¥2,175 was the close-to-peak recovery high (still -15% below the 2021 ATH ¥2,559). **FY12/2023 actual: revenue ¥26,418M (+36% YoY), operating profit ¥X (multi-year average +529% per kabutan); 2-year average revenue growth +50%+** per IR + kabutan. Sign summary: revenue rose +36% YoY; operating profit rose strongly continuing the compounder trajectory; record results; shares rallied to ¥2,175 (Feb 14) on FY22 turn-to-black confirmation, then declined to ¥1,157 (Oct 31) on broader SaaS sector derating. 業績 ◎ (record revenue + record profit) / 株価 mixed (peak then de-rated).

records.rawExplanation: *2024 (record-year #4 — but stock de-rates):* stock ¥928 (Aug 5) – ¥2,036 (Feb 15); Aug 2024 ¥928 was a new multi-year low — below even the 2022 May trough ¥695 measured in dilution-adjusted terms (this is the post-de-rating low). **FY12/2024 actual (announced Feb 14, 2025): net profit ¥2,920M (+2.9x prior period, exceeded prior forecast of ¥1,890M); 4 consecutive years of record-high profit; dividend +¥0.25** per kabutan. Sign summary: revenue rose strongly; operating profit rose record high (4-year streak); net profit rose +2.9x prior period, exceeding the ¥1,890M forecast; shares rallied to ¥2,036 Feb 15 high on the FY24 results, then fell to ¥928 multi-year low (Aug 5) as broader SaaS sector continued to de-rate. **The widening gap between accelerating profitability and depressed stock = under_priced_de_rated_grower** (same shape as Money Forward 2024, PAC 2024, Rakus 2024). 業績 ◎◎ (4-year record streak) / 株価 ✕ (de-rated despite acceleration).

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (record-year #5 — operating margin expanding):* stock ¥991 (Nov 19) – ¥1,875 (Feb 14); Nov 2025 ¥991 was a new multi-year low (only marginally above 2024 Aug ¥928). **FY12/2025 actual (announced ~Feb 2026): revenue ¥43,737M (+28.4% YoY), operating profit ¥2,976M (+50.2%), ARR ¥48,259M (+33.1%), EBITDA ¥6,854M (+39.4%), net profit ¥2,558M (-12.6% on tax/other), operating margin expanding** per IR + ARR data; 5 consecutive years of record-high operating profit. Sign summary: revenue rose +28.4% YoY; operating profit rose +50.2%; ARR rose +33.1%; EBITDA rose +39.4%; operating margin expanding; shares fell to ¥991 multi-year low (Nov 19) despite the +50% OP growth — stock didn't recognize the continued acceleration. 業績 ◎◎ (record OP + margin expansion + ARR acceleration) / 株価 ✕ (still under-priced de-rated grower).

Cautious side: stock still well below the 2021 IPO peak ¥2,559 (Nov 2025 low ¥991 = -61% off ATH); the 2021 peak was post-IPO mania at a level unjustified by the loss-making business at the time, so it may not be a meaningful target; net profit declined -12.6% in FY25 despite strong OP — needs human verification on whether tax effect or operational issue; competitive AI-SaaS pressure from larger global players (Salesforce, Adobe AI tools).

Sources:
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/disclosure/tdnr/20250213574640/ (FY12/2024 通期決算説明資料, Feb 14, 2025)
- https://kabutan.jp/news/?b=k202502140403 (FY12/2024 4期連続最高益 + dividend hike summary)
- https://moneyworld.jp/news/PEB4661_ainews (QUICK FY12/2024 通期決算解説)
- https://moneyworld.jp/news/PIJ2335_ainews (QUICK Q1 FY12/2025 update)
- https://irbank.net/4180/pl (full P/L history)
- https://kitaishihon.com/company/4180/business (segments + business profile)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/company/history/yprice/?scode=4180 (Nikkei 10-year price history)
records.bearCase: stock still well below the 2021 IPO peak ¥2,559 (Nov 2025 low ¥991 = -61% off ATH); the 2021 peak was post-IPO mania at a level unjustified by the loss-making business at the time, so it may not be a meaningful target; net profit declined -12.6% in FY25 despite strong OP — needs human verification on whether tax effect or operational issue; competitive AI-SaaS pressure from larger global players (Salesforce, Adobe AI tools)
